VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited — it appears on the CVF open access page, the ICCV 2025 virtual poster page, and the authors' official GitHub and faculty publication list with the exact title, authors (Chanhwi Jeong, Inhwan Bae, Jin-Hwi Park, Hae-Gon Jeon), venue (ICCV), and year (2025) all matching perfectly.
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/ICCV2025/papers/Jeong_Test-Time_Prompt_Tuning_for_Zero-Shot_Depth_Completion_ICCV_2025_paper.pdf
